name: Black Skillet Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grease a 9 - 10-inch cast iron skillet or a 9-inch square pan.
3. In a large bowl combine cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt.
4. In a liquid measuring cup or a small bowl, mix together the egg and buttermilk.
5. Stir the buttermilk mixture into the dry ingredients.
6. Add corn, 2/3 cup Cheddar cheese, and minced Jalapenos.
7. Stir in melted butter and mix gently.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and top with remaining cheddar cheese.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes and remove from pan to a cooling rack.
